front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body, standing idle pose. The character is a Shadow Weaver — a rogue archer in dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wear light leather armor with a shadow-woven cloak that has semi-transparent edges, and a deep hood. They carry a composite shortbow with shadow arrows in a back quiver, have multiple belt pouches, and a thigh-mounted dagger. Colors: dark charcoal, crimson, shadow purple, and poison green accents. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
